Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

STT 2, 122 [Šu’ila to Šamaš][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1'o 1'

[...] x a-pil [...]

[...] ..., son of [...]!

o 2'2'

ZALAG₂ ⸢ed⸣-<deš>-⸢šu⸣-u [...] UN-MEŠ [...]  ; x [...]

Light constantly renewing itself, [...] people [...] ... [...]!

o 3'3'

dUTU muš-te-⸢šir⸣ [x x] u [...]

Šamaš, the one who brings order [...] and [...]!

o 4'4'

[ba]-⸢a-ar? kal?⸣ [mim]-⸢ma⸣ [x x]

The one who scrutinises everything [...].

o 5'5'

dUTU ZALAG₂ AN u ⸢KI⸣ x x [...]

Šamaš, light of heaven (and) earth, ... [...]!

o 6'6'

[x] ZIMBIRki x [...]

[...] of Sippar, [...]!

o 7'7'

⸢ta⸣-lim dAMAR.UTU [...]

Favourite brother of Marduk, [...]!

o 8'8'

[x] ⸢nu-ri⸣-ka ⸢u₂⸣-pa-qa [...]

[...] are attentive [...] your light!

(end obverse missing)
(missing)
